title: crambe gomeraea
intro: Crambe gomeraea, also known as Canary Island cabbage or Gomera cabbage, is a perennial plant native to the island of La Gomera in the Canary Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been shown to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a potential treatment for various gastrointestinal issues. Crambe gomeraea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
